display_text: Seer Stone, Tier Neutral: Neutral item that reveals an 800 radius target area for 6 seconds, providing 350 bonus cast range and vision, plus 10 mana regeneration. Provides strategic vision for checking high ground, Roshan pit, or juke spots without committing. Stats: CD: 60s, Duration: 6s, Radius: 800, Vision Bonus: +350, Cast Range Bonus: +350, Mana Regen: +10.
